# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers code recommendations to be shown in code blocks with a clear explanation alongside them.

## Project Context
- This project is a personal habit tracker built as deliberate practice to develop from junior toward intermediate/senior .NET development.
- The project is being developed with the intent to learn how to design each layer with clear responsibility boundaries using a layered architecture.

## Engineering Approach
- Prefer maintainable, production-leaning solutions over quick junior-style shortcuts.
- Favor clear domain modeling, explicit validation, and protecting invariants in the domain layer.
- Prefer encapsulation over overly public mutable models.
- Prefer separation of concerns across Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and API layers.
- Keep solutions simple and pragmatic; avoid unnecessary complexity or overengineering.
- When making recommendations, briefly explain why the approach is more intermediate/senior in style when relevant.
